installCommand: echo '=== cwd:' && pwd && echo '=== ls:' && ls -la && echo '=== install:' && npm ci && echo '=== root node_modules/@from-victory ===' && ls -la node_modules/@from-victory/ 2>&1 || true && echo '=== apps/web node_modules/@from-victory ===' && ls -la apps/web/node_modules/@from-victory/ 2>&1 || true
